title: Helpful Brewing Stand
description: A replaced texture of the Brewing Stand, which will help players know what ingredients are needed for each type of potion
body: This Resource Pack changes the GUI of the Brewing Stand to help the player figure out the types of ingredients needed to make each specific potion! This is not only great for new players, but even seasoned players as well! All you need to do is put it into your resources folder and make sure to select it when yu want to use it! There are many videos on YouTube explaining how to download and install resource packs.
